RuleSet.Name: src/schemapub/ISchemaPubTableHPKey.java
RuleSet.Descr: Java 25 public interface for a $TableName$ history primary key object

GenFile.Name: reallyFileISchemaPubTableHPKeyJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub

RuleSet.GenRule: $poptop SchemaDef declPubAuditClusterIdGetterSetter$$poptop SchemaDef declPubAuditStampGetterSetter$$poptop SchemaDef declPubAuditActionIdGetterSetter$$poptop SchemaDef declPubRevisionGetterSetter$$poptop SchemaDef declPubAuditSessionIdGetterSetter$$reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each declPubColumnGetterSetter )$$reference PrimaryKeyIndex declPubHPKeyEquals$$reference PrimaryKeyIndex declPubHPKeyGetHashCode$$reference PrimaryKeyIndex declPubHPKeyCompareTo$$reference PrimaryKeyIndex declPubHPKeyToString$
public CFLibDbKeyHash256 getAuditClusterId(); public void setAuditClusterId( CFLibDbKeyHash256 value );
public LocalDateTime getAuditStamp(); public void setAuditStamp( LocalDateTime value );
public short getAuditActionId(); public void setAuditActionId( short value );
public CFLibDbKeyHash256 getAuditSessionId(); public void setAuditSessionId( CFLibDbKeyHash256 value );
